title: Cobblemon Mass Outbreak Essentials
description: Adds 284 outbreaks of first-stage evolution Pokemon
body:
# Cobblemon Mass Outbreak Essentials
If Cobblemon Mass Outbreak's default outbreaks aren't enough for you, try this datapack.  
**Requires [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) & [Cobblemon Mass Outbreaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mass-outbreaks)**

There are three main goals of this datapack:
1. Add hundreds of varied outbreaks across different biomes
2. Only add Pokemon low down in the evolution chain
3. Pokemon levels won't exceed their evolution threshold

This datapack makes outbreaks feel more like a group of low-level roaming pikachu, rather than a home invasion of level 98 Arcanine.

*Your config file's shiny odds are respected by the datapack.*

### Comprehensive List of Outbreaks
- #0001 Bulbasaur
- #0004 Charmander
- #0007 Squirtle
- #0010 Caterpie
- #0013 Weedle
- #0016 Pidgey
